@graph.description: Oral lavender oil preparation Silexan has stronger anxiety evidence than generic lavender/aromatherapy claims; meta-analysis of 5 placebo-controlled trials used 80 mg/day for 10 weeks and showed anxiolytic effects with favorable tolerability.
